patient_summary:
• 73/Female patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, MRSA, COVID-19
• Key Procedures: Colonoscopy with biopsy
• Active Meds: 1 medications including Atorvastatin
• Critical Labs: Ferritin 266.8 (H); Iron 41 (L); Triglycerides 158 (H); eGFR 58 (L)
• Key History: MRSA R breast 09/03/2020
